# Acme

---
title: About Acme
url: https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/about
type: landing
locale: en-US
summary: Founded to make agent-content interchange a default.
---

Acme builds the open standard for agent content trees.

<!-- component: marketing:hero -->

<!-- component: marketing:testimonial -->


---
title: Contact
url: https://acme.example.com/en-US/landing/contact
type: landing
locale: en-US
summary: Talk to sales, support, or community.
---

Reach out via the channels below.

<!-- component: marketing:hero -->

<!-- component: marketing:cta -->

locale: en-US
summary: "Acme's data-processing terms for enterprise customers."
---

This addendum supplements the master services agreement.

<!-- component: marketing:hero -->


---

locale: en-US
summary: Everything you need to build with ACT.
---

From source adapters to runtime SDKs, ACT covers the full producer surface.
